author: y4rr
content: [result] Added end-to-end f64 GPU support for 14 core operations: ADD, SUB, MUL, DIV, NEG, RELU, SCALE, EXP, LOG, SQRT, POW, ABS, SIGMOID, TANH. Includes 14 f64 PTX kernels, f64 launch helpers, ~70 _f64 GpuBackend trait methods (stubs for unimplemented ops), 14 backend_impl wiring methods, 10 dispatch site updates, is_f64 helpers in 7 files. All 3255 tests pass. Remaining: backward ops, activation/norm/reduction/shape/matmul f64 kernels.
